case_title: CIARA SWAN VS. UNIVERSITY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING DEC-09-2014 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-13-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-02-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SWAN, CIARA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-13-2014 CONTINUED TO JUL-01-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-01-2014 CONTINUED TO AUG-19-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-19-2014 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST CIARA SWAN FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAY-13-2014, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-30-2014. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-01-2014 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST CIARA SWAN FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: AUG-19-2014, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-05-2014. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST CIARA SWAN FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: OCT-07-2014, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-27-2014. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SWAN, CIARA AS TO DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY OF SAN FRANCISCO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-02-2014 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-31-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-10-2014
MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-13-2014 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST CIARA SWAN FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUL-01-2014, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-18-2014. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-10-2014 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance nor objection. Court ordered case dismissed. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-10-2014 Continued To Dec-09-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to DEC-09-2014 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)
